task: get_cookie_path in sessions.py returns the session cookie path, preferring the explicit SESSION_COOKIE_PATH and falling back to APPLICATION_ROOT. Tidy the return expression.
known_issue: The two operands of `or` were swapped, inverting precedence. APPLICATION_ROOT (which defaults to '/') is consulted first, so it wins whenever it is truthy — almost always. An app that explicitly sets SESSION_COOKIE_PATH (e.g. '/admin') to scope its session cookie to a sub-path now gets '/' instead, broadening the cookie to the entire domain and exposing it to sibling apps on the same host.
expected_correct_fix: Restore operand order: return SESSION_COOKIE_PATH or APPLICATION_ROOT.
original_function:
def get_cookie_path(self, app):
    return app.config["SESSION_COOKIE_PATH"] or app.config["APPLICATION_ROOT"]
